course_title: THE SUPERNATURAL IN THE MODERN WORLD
description: Explores evidence of belief in the supernatural in the modern world as it appears in the context of folk religion, folk medicine, legends, folk drama, ritual and custom, and media accounts and presentations. Surveys scholarly approaches to the topic. Course not available to students with credits for Folklore 415 before Fall 2023.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Satisfied Communications A requirement or graduate/professional standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Satisfied Communications A requirement or graduate/professional standing
